---
title: "UML"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{UML}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

```{r}
#| label: pkgs
#| echo: false
use("nemo", "nemo_uml")
```

```{r}
#| label: uml
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
cat(nemo_uml(classes = c("Config", "Tool", "Tool1", "Workflow", "Workflow1"), pkg = "nemo"))
```
